sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14416" key="a)probouli/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπροβουλ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n14416.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">want of premeditation,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg034.perseus-grc1:867b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">867b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
